diagrams.title: Many-to-One Model Diagram
diagrams.description: Shows multiple user threads (Thread 1, 2, 3) all mapped to a single kernel thread managed by the OS kernel
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how all user threads share one kernel thread and the blocking problem

diagrams.title: One-to-One Model Diagram
diagrams.description: Shows each user thread mapped to its own dedicated kernel thread
diagrams.purpose: Understanding true parallelism support in One-to-One model

diagrams.title: Many-to-Many Model Diagram
diagrams.description: Shows multiple user threads multiplexed to a pool of kernel threads
elements: Kernel Thread Pool (fewer than user threads)
diagrams.purpose: Understanding flexible mapping and balanced resource utilization

diagrams.title: Thread Sharing in Same Process
diagrams.description: Shows what is shared between threads in a process vs what is private to each thread
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the difference between shared resources and thread-private data
